subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath spoken forth one Word from among His exalted Words, and thereby hath distinguished between His servants in the realm of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق بکلمه من کلماته العلیا و بها فصل بین العباد فی ناسوت الانشاء
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
